name: 12" x 16" Today is a Good Day Framed Wall Canvas Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Inspirational Quote Decor
description:
Liven up your living spaces with the 12" x 16" Today is a Good Day Framed Wall Canvas Brown from Threshold designed with Studio McGee. This simple framed work has a powerful message for every day, "Today is a good day." Printed in simple black lettering on off-white canvas, this piece fits most decor styles neatly. Put this up on an empty patch of wall or prop it up on your mantelpiece or desk to make an impression on anyone who reads it.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
